issues.detail: The skill file does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases beyond webhook signature verification.
The skill file assumes a Node.js environment, limiting applicability to other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: checkout-with-custom-data
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses createCheckout from @lemonsqueezy/lemonsqueezy.js with checkoutData.custom for user_id and productOptions.enabledVariants per skill; baseline reaches for raw REST without the SDK shape.

scenarios.name: webhook-subscription-lifecycle
scenarios.rationale: Treatment verifies the x-signature HMAC-sha256 and switches on event_name for subscription_created/updated/cancelled per skill; baseline knows webhook signing conceptually but misses Lemon Squeezy's specific header and event names.
